Get In Touch →

Beyond Client Work

Programs

Four programs. Each one a different relationship with design. Client services are what we do — programs are how we think about it.

01
Creative Department

Embedded Design Team

Ongoing · Embedded · Senior Retainer Explore →

Our flagship retainer — a dedicated design team embedded in your business. Senior designers allocated to your account, across all four HS108 practices, working in structured monthly sprints.

What's Included

  • Dedicated senior designers
  • All four practices under one retainer
  • Monthly sprints + quarterly strategy
  • Unlimited design requests
  • Async collaboration in your tools
  • No change orders for small asks
02
Design Lab

Research & Discovery

Research · Discovery · Thinking Project Explore →

For design problems that don't have obvious answers. Rigorous user research, structured discovery sprints, and systems thinking — before any execution begins.

What's Included

  • Deep-dive user research
  • Discovery sprints (2–4 weeks)
  • Complex systems design
  • Concept development & exploration
  • Co-design workshops
  • Research outputs + design briefs
03
off_menu

Bespoke Packages

Custom · Cross-Discipline · Tailored Bespoke Explore →

Your project doesn't fit a standard package. off_menu is for clients who need a custom scope — combining disciplines, structures, and timelines in ways that standard services don't allow.

What's Included

  • Cross-discipline engagements
  • Custom scope + team assembly
  • All four practices available to combine
  • Flexible engagement structure
  • Tailored timeline and milestones
  • Single point of contact
04
Field Notes

Design Conversations

Conversations · Publications · Events Community Explore →

A platform for discourse with designers, artisans, and industry thinkers. Conversations, publications, and events that engage with the ideas that shape the practice of design.

What's Included

  • Design conversations & interviews
  • Published essays & criticism
  • Material & craft dialogues
  • Design & commerce discussions
  • Visual culture explorations
  • Open to practitioners at all stages

Not a Program? Try a Service

WebCanvas

Digital design — websites, apps, and product interfaces.

View Service →

CX&Identity

Branding and identity systems built to last.

View Service →

CMF_Nexus

Product design from concept sketch to production.

View Service →

Lumina.raw

Photography and video that stops the scroll.

View Service →

Not sure which program fits?

Start with a conversation.

Programs work differently to standard services. Tell us what you're trying to build and we'll explain what makes sense for your situation.
